entry.title: Azure AI Metrics Advisor
entry.description: Azure AI Metrics Advisor provides anomaly detection and diagnostics for time-series data to monitor business metrics at scale.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier includes up to 10,000 data points per month and 1 anomaly alert per hour.
caveats: Additional usage billed per data point and alert
Requires Azure account
billingRiskNotes: Exceeding free tier limits incurs charges automatically

quickstartSteps: Sign in to the Azure Portal and create a Metrics Advisor resource.
Connect your data source (e.g., Azure Blob Storage, SQL Database).
Configure metrics and set up anomaly detection parameters.
Set up alerting rules and notification channels.
Monitor dashboards and review detected anomalies.
entry.whenToUse: Use when you need automated anomaly detection and diagnostics for time-series business metrics with minimal setup.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require unlimited free usage, advanced custom models, or need to monitor metrics outside Azure-supported sources.
entry.body: Azure AI Metrics Advisor offers scalable, automated anomaly detection and diagnostics for time-series data, ideal for monitoring business metrics and alerting on unexpected trends.

entry.title: Azure Data Catalog
entry.description: Azure Data Catalog is a fully managed cloud service for registering, discovering, and annotating enterprise data assets.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier allows up to 5 users with unlimited asset registrations.
caveats: No SLA for free tier
Limited to 5 users; upgrade required for more

useCases: Centralizing metadata for enterprise data sources
quickstartSteps: Sign in to the Azure portal.
Create a new Azure Data Catalog instance.
Invite up to 5 users to your catalog.
Register data sources and annotate assets.
Enable search and discovery for your team.
entry.whenToUse: Use when you need a managed solution for registering and discovering data assets across your organization with minimal setup.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require support for more than 5 users without cost, or need advanced data governance features.
entry.body: Azure Data Catalog provides a simple way to register, discover, and annotate data assets, making it easier for teams to find and understand enterprise data.

entry.title: Azure Logic Apps
entry.description: Azure Logic Apps enables automated workflows to integrate apps, data, and services across cloud and on-premises environments.

freeTierDetails.summary: 750 free actions per month for consumption-based workflows.
caveats: Standard and Integration Service Environment plans are not covered by the free tier
Premium connectors incur extra charges
billingRiskNotes: Charges apply if you exceed 750 actions/month or use premium connectors

quickstartSteps: Sign in to the Azure Portal.
Create a new Logic App resource.
Choose a workflow template or start from blank.
Add triggers and actions to define your workflow.
Save and run the Logic App to test automation.
entry.whenToUse: Use when you need to automate workflows or integrate multiple services without writing custom code.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require complex, low-latency, or highly customized integrations beyond what connectors provide.
entry.body: Azure Logic Apps provides a serverless way to automate workflows and integrate cloud or on-premises systems using a visual designer and prebuilt connectors.

entry.title: Azure Monitor
entry.description: Azure Monitor provides full-stack monitoring, metrics, and diagnostics for applications and infrastructure on Azure.

freeTierDetails.summary: Includes 5 GB of data ingestion and 31 days of log data retention per month.
caveats: Overages billed per GB
Some features may incur additional costs
billingRiskNotes: Data ingestion above free tier is billed automatically

useCases: Set up alerts for application health
quickstartSteps: Sign in to the Azure Portal.
Navigate to 'Monitor' and create a Log Analytics workspace.
Connect your Azure resources to the workspace.
Configure data collection and retention settings.
Set up alerts and dashboards as needed.
entry.whenToUse: Use Azure Monitor to track performance, logs, and health of Azure-hosted resources with integrated dashboards and alerting.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you need to monitor non-Azure infrastructure or require a hard cap to prevent unexpected charges.
entry.body: Azure Monitor offers integrated monitoring, logging, and alerting for Azure resources, with a generous free tier and scalable paid options for larger workloads.

entry.title: Better Stack Uptime
entry.description: Monitors website and service uptime with incident alerts, status pages, and integrations.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free plan includes 10 monitors, 3 status pages, and basic alerting.
caveats: No phone or SMS alerts on free tier
Limited integrations

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a Better Stack account.
Add your website or service URL as a new monitor.
Configure alerting channels (email, Slack, Teams).
Set up a status page if desired.
Review uptime reports and receive alerts as needed.
entry.whenToUse: Use when you need simple, reliable uptime monitoring and public status pages for websites or APIs.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require advanced alerting (SMS/phone), custom integrations, or need to monitor more than 10 services for free.
entry.body: Better Stack Uptime provides free monitoring for up to 10 services with basic alerting and public status pages, ideal for small projects and teams.

entry.title: Bugsnag
entry.description: Bugsnag provides real-time error monitoring and alerting for applications across multiple platforms.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier includes error monitoring for up to 7,500 events per month for one project.
caveats: No advanced workflow integrations
Limited to one project

useCases: Receive real-time alerts for new issues
quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free Bugsnag account.
Create a new project for your application.
Install the Bugsnag SDK in your app using the provided instructions.
Configure your API key in your application.
Deploy your app and verify error reporting in the Bugsnag dashboard.
entry.whenToUse: Use Bugsnag when you need simple, real-time error monitoring and alerting for a single project or small application.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require monitoring for multiple projects, advanced workflow integrations, or higher event volumes without upgrading.
entry.body: Bugsnag offers a free tier for error monitoring with a 7,500 event monthly limit and basic alerting, ideal for small projects and early-stage apps.

entry.title: Checkly
entry.description: Checkly provides synthetic monitoring for APIs and web apps with programmable checks and alerting.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier includes 50,000 API checks and 5,000 browser checks per month.
caveats: Limited to 1 team member and 1 project
No advanced alerting integrations

useCases: Test web app flows with browser checks
quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free Checkly account.
Create a new project in your dashboard.
Add an API or browser check with your target URL.
Configure alerting options (email, webhook, etc).
Review monitoring results and set up additional checks as needed.
entry.whenToUse: Use Checkly to monitor API endpoints or web app flows with programmable checks and receive downtime alerts.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you need monitoring for more than one team member, advanced alerting, or high-frequency checks beyond the free tier.
entry.body: Checkly offers programmable synthetic monitoring for APIs and web apps, allowing users to automate uptime and performance checks with alerting on failures.

entry.title: Datadog
entry.description: Datadog provides cloud-based monitoring, observability, and security for applications and infrastructure.

freeTierDetails.summary: 14-day free trial with full access to core monitoring and observability features.
limits: Includes APM, infrastructure, and log management
caveats: Requires credit card for signup
No always-free tier after trial ends
billingRiskNotes: Service disables after trial unless upgraded

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a Datadog account and start the free trial.
Install the Datadog Agent on your servers or cloud instances.
Connect your cloud provider or services for automatic integration.
Set up dashboards and alerts for key metrics.
Explore logs, traces, and APM features in the Datadog UI.
entry.whenToUse: Use Datadog when you need unified monitoring, logging, and APM for cloud infrastructure or distributed applications.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you need a permanent free tier or have strict budget constraints, as usage beyond trial requires a paid plan.
entry.body: Datadog offers a comprehensive observability platform with monitoring, logging, and APM, ideal for teams managing modern cloud infrastructure and applications.

entry.title: GlitchTip
entry.description: GlitchTip is an open-source error tracking and monitoring service for web and mobile applications.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier includes 1,000 events per month and 1 project.
caveats: Overages require paid plan
No phone support on free tier

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free GlitchTip account.
Create a new project in the dashboard.
Copy the provided DSN (Data Source Name).
Install a compatible Sentry SDK in your app.
Configure the SDK with your GlitchTip DSN.
Trigger a test error to verify integration.
entry.whenToUse: Use GlitchTip when you need simple, open-source error monitoring with a generous free tier for small projects.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you need advanced analytics, high event volumes, or enterprise integrations beyond basic error tracking.
entry.body: GlitchTip provides open-source error tracking with a free tier suitable for small projects, supporting Sentry SDKs and easy integration for web and mobile apps.

entry.title: Grafana Cloud
entry.description: Managed observability platform offering dashboards, metrics, logs, and traces with a generous always-free tier.

freeTierDetails.summary: Always-free plan includes 10k series for metrics, 50GB logs, 50GB traces, 3 users, and 14-day retention.
caveats: Overages may incur charges
Some integrations and plugins require paid plans
billingRiskNotes: Usage above free limits is billed automatically

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a Grafana Cloud account.
Create a new stack from the dashboard.
Connect your data sources (Prometheus, Loki, Tempo, etc.).
Import or build dashboards to visualize your data.
Set up alerts as needed.
entry.whenToUse: Use Grafana Cloud to quickly set up dashboards, metrics, logs, and traces without managing infrastructure.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you need unlimited data retention, advanced integrations, or want to self-host for full control.
entry.body: Grafana Cloud provides a managed observability platform with free access to metrics, logs, and traces, ideal for small teams and projects.

entry.title: Honeybadger.io
entry.description: Honeybadger.io provides error monitoring, uptime checks, and alerting for web applications and services.

freeTierDetails.summary: 14-day free trial with full access to all features.

useCases: Monitor application errors in real time
Receive alerts for downtime or exceptions
quickstartSteps: Sign up for a Honeybadger.io account.
Create a new project in the dashboard.
Install the Honeybadger client library in your application.
Configure the client with your project API key.
Deploy your application to start receiving error reports.
entry.whenToUse: Use Honeybadger.io when you need simple, reliable error monitoring and uptime alerts for web applications or APIs.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require a permanent free tier or need advanced log management and analytics beyond error tracking.
entry.body: Honeybadger.io offers error monitoring, uptime checks, and alerting for web applications, with a 14-day free trial and easy integration.

entry.title: HS Ping
entry.description: HS Ping provides free uptime monitoring and alerting for websites and APIs with simple setup and notifications.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free plan includes basic uptime checks and email alerts for a limited number of monitors.
caveats: No SMS or advanced integrations on free tier
Limited historical data retention

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free HS Ping account at https://hsping.com.
Log in and click 'Add Monitor'.
Enter your website or API URL and configure check interval.
Set up your email address for notifications.
Save and activate your monitor.
entry.whenToUse: Use HS Ping when you need simple, free uptime monitoring and email alerts for a small number of sites or APIs.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require SMS/phone alerts, advanced integrations, or need to monitor more than five endpoints.
entry.body: HS Ping offers a straightforward, always-free way to monitor up to five websites or APIs with 1-minute checks and email alerts, ideal for personal or small-scale use.

entry.title: Incidenthub.cloud
entry.description: Incidenthub.cloud provides hosted status pages and incident communication tools for teams and organizations.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free plan includes one public status page with basic incident management features.
caveats: Custom domains and advanced integrations require paid plans

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free Incidenthub.cloud account.
Create a new status page and configure your service components.
Customize your status page branding and notification settings.
Share your status page link with users or embed it on your website.
Post incidents and updates as needed.
entry.whenToUse: Use when you need a simple, hosted status page to communicate incidents and uptime to users without complex setup.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require custom domains, advanced integrations, or private status pages on the free tier.
entry.body: Incidenthub.cloud offers a straightforward way to create and manage public status pages, making it easy to keep users informed during outages or incidents. The free tier is suitable for small teams or projects needing basic incident communication, but advanced features like custom domains and integrations require a paid plan.

entry.title: Logflare.app
entry.description: Logflare.app provides log management and analytics with real-time search and integrations for cloud applications.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier includes basic log ingestion, search, and retention for small projects.
caveats: No advanced alerting or team features
Retention and ingestion limits may restrict larger workloads

useCases: Centralized log collection for web apps
quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free Logflare account at https://logflare.app/.
Create a new source to receive logs.
Copy your source API key and endpoint.
Configure your application or service to send logs to Logflare.
View and search logs in the Logflare dashboard.
entry.whenToUse: Use Logflare.app for simple, real-time log management and analytics in small to medium cloud projects or prototypes.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you need long-term retention, advanced alerting, or high-ingestion volumes for enterprise-scale workloads.
entry.body: Logflare.app offers a straightforward, always-free log management solution with real-time analytics, ideal for developers needing quick setup and basic observability.

entry.title: Logtail.com
entry.description: Logtail.com provides cloud-based log management and analysis with real-time search and visualization.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free plan includes log ingestion, search, and retention for small projects.
caveats: Retention and ingestion limits are strict
No SAML/SSO on free plan

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free Logtail account.
Create a new source for your application.
Install the Logtail logging agent or use provided API/SDK.
Configure your app or server to send logs to Logtail.
View and search logs in the Logtail dashboard.
entry.whenToUse: Use Logtail when you need simple, cloud-based log management for small apps or prototypes with minimal setup.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require long-term retention, high ingestion volumes, or enterprise features like SSO and advanced alerting.
entry.body: Logtail.com offers a user-friendly, cloud-based log management platform with a generous free tier for small projects, enabling real-time log search and visualization with minimal setup.

entry.title: Logto
entry.description: Logto provides authentication and authorization as a service for web, mobile, and native applications.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier includes up to 5,000 monthly active users and unlimited applications.
caveats: No custom domains on free tier
Limited to community support

useCases: Add authentication to web or mobile apps
quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free Logto account at https://logto.io/.
Create a new application in the Logto dashboard.
Configure redirect URIs and authentication settings.
Integrate Logto SDK into your app using provided documentation.
Test authentication flow in your application.
entry.whenToUse: Use Logto when you need a quick, managed authentication solution for web or mobile apps with generous free limits.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require custom domains, advanced enterprise features, or on-premises deployment in the free tier.
entry.body: Logto offers a developer-friendly authentication and authorization platform with a generous free tier, supporting modern identity protocols and easy integration.

entry.title: Logzab.com
entry.description: Logzab.com provides free, privacy-focused log hosting and sharing for developers and teams.

freeTierDetails.summary: Unlimited free log hosting and sharing with privacy features.
caveats: No long-term log retention
Not suitable for sensitive production data

useCases: Share logs for debugging with collaborators
Host logs for open source projects
quickstartSteps: Go to https://logzab.com/ in your browser.
Paste or upload your log file.
Set privacy options and expiration if needed.
Share the generated link with collaborators.
entry.whenToUse: Use Logzab.com to quickly share logs with others for debugging or support without creating an account.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid for storing sensitive, confidential, or long-term production logs due to limited retention and privacy guarantees.
entry.body: Logzab.com offers a simple, privacy-focused platform for sharing logs online, ideal for quick debugging and collaboration without registration.

entry.title: ManageEngine Log360 Cloud
entry.description: Cloud-based SIEM platform offering log management, threat detection, and compliance for IT environments.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free 30-day trial with full access to all features.

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a ManageEngine Log360 Cloud account.
Verify your email and log in to the dashboard.
Add your cloud or on-premises log sources.
Configure log collection and parsing settings.
Set up alert rules and compliance reports.
entry.whenToUse: Use when you need centralized log management, threat detection, and compliance monitoring for cloud or hybrid IT environments.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require a permanently free tier, on-premises-only deployment, or integration with unsupported log sources.
entry.body: ManageEngine Log360 Cloud provides a cloud-based SIEM solution for centralized log management, threat detection, and compliance, suitable for organizations seeking robust security monitoring with a 30-day free trial.

entry.title: MonitorMonk
entry.description: MonitorMonk provides free uptime monitoring and status pages for websites and APIs with instant alerts.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free plan includes uptime checks and public status pages.
caveats: No SMS or advanced integrations on free plan
Limited to basic monitoring features

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free MonitorMonk account.
Add your website or API URL as a new monitor.
Configure alert email addresses.
Create and customize a public status page.
Review uptime reports and receive alerts.
entry.whenToUse: Use MonitorMonk to monitor small websites or APIs and share simple status pages without cost or setup complexity.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you need advanced integrations, SMS alerts, or to monitor more than 5 endpoints.
entry.body: MonitorMonk offers a simple, always-free plan for basic uptime monitoring and public status pages, ideal for small projects and personal use.

entry.title: New Relic
entry.description: New Relic provides cloud-based observability and monitoring for applications, infrastructure, and logs in real time.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier includes 100 GB/month of data ingest, unlimited users, and core platform features.
caveats: Advanced features require paid plans
Data retention limited to 8 days on free tier

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a New Relic account.
Install the New Relic agent in your application or infrastructure.
Configure your environment using the provided license key.
Access the New Relic dashboard to view metrics and logs.
entry.whenToUse: Use New Relic to monitor application performance, infrastructure, and logs with a unified dashboard and generous free data ingest.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you need longer data retention, advanced analytics, or expect to exceed 100 GB/month without budget for paid plans.
bestFor: OSS projects with moderate data needs
entry.body: New Relic offers a robust free tier for unified application, infrastructure, and log monitoring, ideal for startups and teams with moderate observability needs.

entry.title: Pingbreak.com
entry.description: Pingbreak.com offers free uptime monitoring with instant alerts for your websites and APIs.

freeTierDetails.summary: Unlimited free uptime monitoring with email alerts.
caveats: No SMS or phone alerts
No advanced integrations

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free Pingbreak.com account.
Log in and click 'Add a monitor'.
Enter your website or API URL.
Set your preferred check interval and alert email.
Save the monitor to start receiving alerts.
entry.whenToUse: Use Pingbreak.com to monitor basic website or API uptime with instant email alerts and no cost.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you need SMS/phone alerts, advanced integrations, or detailed performance analytics.
entry.body: Pingbreak.com provides free, simple uptime monitoring for websites and APIs, sending instant email alerts if your service goes down. It is ideal for individuals and small projects needing basic, no-cost monitoring without advanced features or integrations.

entry.title: Pingmeter.com
entry.description: Pingmeter.com provides free uptime and SSL monitoring for websites with instant alerts and simple setup.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free plan includes uptime and SSL monitoring for up to 5 websites with email alerts.
caveats: No SMS or advanced integrations on free plan
Limited to basic monitoring features

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free Pingmeter.com account.
Log in and add your website URL(s) to monitor.
Configure alert email addresses.
Review monitoring dashboard for status updates.
Optionally adjust check frequency or notification settings.
entry.whenToUse: Use Pingmeter.com to monitor uptime and SSL status for a small number of websites with simple email alerts.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you need SMS alerts, advanced integrations, or monitoring for more than 5 sites.
entry.body: Pingmeter.com offers free, easy-to-use uptime and SSL monitoring for up to 5 websites, making it ideal for individuals and small teams needing basic website health checks.

entry.title: Pingpong.one
entry.description: Pingpong.one offers free, privacy-focused uptime monitoring and status pages for websites and APIs.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free plan includes 5 monitors, 1 status page, and basic alerting.
caveats: No SMS or advanced integrations on free tier
Limited customization for status pages

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free Pingpong.one account.
Add your website or API endpoint as a monitor.
Configure check interval and alert preferences.
Create a status page and link your monitors.
Verify alerts by simulating downtime.
entry.whenToUse: Use Pingpong.one to monitor uptime for a few sites or APIs and share simple status pages with users.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you need advanced integrations, SMS alerts, or monitoring for more than five endpoints.
entry.body: Pingpong.one provides simple, privacy-friendly uptime monitoring and status pages with a generous free tier suitable for individuals and small teams.

entry.title: Pingram.io
entry.description: Pingram.io provides free uptime monitoring and status pages for websites and APIs with instant alerts.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free plan includes basic uptime monitoring and public status pages.
caveats: No SMS or advanced integrations on free tier
Limited to basic status page customization

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free Pingram.io account.
Log in and click 'Add Monitor'.
Enter your website or API URL and configure check interval.
Set up your email for alert notifications.
Create a status page and add your monitors.
entry.whenToUse: Use Pingram.io when you need simple, free uptime monitoring and public status pages for small projects or personal sites.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require advanced integrations, SMS alerts, or need to monitor more than 5 endpoints.
entry.body: Pingram.io offers a straightforward, always-free tier for basic uptime monitoring and public status pages, ideal for individuals and small projects needing simple observability without cost or complexity.

entry.title: Pocket Alert
entry.description: Pocket Alert provides free uptime and SSL monitoring with instant notifications for websites and APIs.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier includes uptime and SSL checks with instant notifications.
caveats: Limited to basic monitoring features
No advanced integrations

useCases: Get notified of SSL certificate expiry
quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free Pocket Alert account.
Add your website or API URL to create a monitor.
Configure notification channels such as email or Telegram.
Set up SSL expiry alerts if needed.
Review monitoring dashboard for status updates.
entry.whenToUse: Use Pocket Alert to monitor a small number of websites or APIs for uptime and SSL issues with instant notifications.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you need advanced monitoring, custom integrations, or support for more than 5 monitors.
entry.body: Pocket Alert offers simple, free uptime and SSL monitoring for up to 5 sites, making it ideal for individuals and small teams needing basic observability.

entry.title: Project Gatekeeper
entry.description: Project Gatekeeper provides a free, privacy-focused, passwordless authentication service for web and mobile applications.

freeTierDetails.summary: Unlimited free authentication for personal and small-scale projects.
caveats: No guaranteed uptime or support
Not intended for high-traffic enterprise use

useCases: Add passwordless login to web apps
quickstartSteps: Sign up at the Project Gatekeeper website.
Register your application to obtain API credentials.
Integrate the SDK or REST API into your app.
Configure authentication callbacks and test login flow.
entry.whenToUse: Use when you need simple, privacy-focused, passwordless authentication for personal, indie, or open-source projects.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid for enterprise or high-traffic production apps needing SLAs, advanced compliance, or dedicated support.
entry.body: Project Gatekeeper offers free, privacy-first, passwordless authentication for web and mobile apps, ideal for personal, indie, and open-source projects.

entry.title: ProxySentry
entry.description: ProxySentry provides managed rotating proxies for web scraping, data collection, and automation tasks.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier offers limited monthly proxy requests for testing and small-scale scraping.
caveats: Performance may vary during peak times
No dedicated IPs on free tier

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free ProxySentry account.
Verify your email and log in to the dashboard.
Generate your proxy access credentials.
Integrate the proxy endpoint into your scraping tool or script.
Monitor usage and upgrade if higher limits are needed.
entry.whenToUse: Use ProxySentry when you need rotating proxies for lightweight scraping or automation without managing your own proxy infrastructure.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require high-volume, dedicated proxies, advanced geotargeting, or guaranteed uptime for production workloads.
entry.body: ProxySentry offers a managed rotating proxy service with a free tier suitable for testing and small-scale scraping, requiring no credit card for signup.

entry.title: Rollbar.com
entry.description: Rollbar provides real-time error monitoring and debugging tools for applications across multiple platforms.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier includes 5,000 events per month with basic features.
caveats: No advanced features like SSO or advanced analytics
Limited to 1 user

useCases: Receive real-time alerts for production issues
quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free Rollbar account.
Create a new project and select your platform.
Install the Rollbar SDK in your application.
Configure your access token and environment.
Deploy your app and verify error reporting.
entry.whenToUse: Use Rollbar when you need real-time error tracking and alerting for web or mobile applications with minimal setup.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you need unlimited users, advanced analytics, or integration with enterprise authentication out of the box.
entry.body: Rollbar offers a free plan for error monitoring with basic features, suitable for small projects and individual developers needing real-time alerts and debugging.

entry.title: ScrapingAnt
entry.description: ScrapingAnt provides a simple API for web scraping with proxy rotation and browser rendering.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier includes 1000 API requests per month with proxy rotation and browser rendering.
caveats: No dedicated proxies
Limited support on free tier

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free ScrapingAnt account.
Obtain your API key from the dashboard.
Read the API documentation for request structure.
Make your first API call using your preferred language.
Review usage statistics in your dashboard.
entry.whenToUse: Use ScrapingAnt when you need to scrape public web data with minimal setup and want proxy rotation or browser rendering.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you need to scrape high volumes, require dedicated proxies, or must comply with strict anti-bot policies.
entry.body: ScrapingAnt offers a simple, always-free tier for web scraping with proxy rotation and browser rendering, ideal for small projects and prototyping.

entry.title: Sentry
entry.description: Sentry provides error tracking and performance monitoring for web and mobile applications.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier includes basic error and performance monitoring for small projects.
caveats: Limited to one user
No advanced features like release health or custom dashboards

useCases: Receive real-time alerts for production issues
quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free Sentry account at sentry.io.
Create a new project for your application.
Install the Sentry SDK in your app using the recommended method for your stack.
Configure the SDK with your project DSN.
Deploy your app and trigger an error to verify integration.
entry.whenToUse: Use Sentry to monitor and debug errors or performance issues in web, mobile, or backend applications with minimal setup.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid Sentry if you need unlimited users, advanced analytics, or high-volume monitoring without upgrading to a paid plan.
entry.body: Sentry offers a generous free tier for error and performance monitoring, making it ideal for small projects, students, and open source maintainers. The platform provides real-time alerts, integrations with popular frameworks, and a simple setup process. However, teams needing more users, advanced analytics, or higher event volumes will need to upgrade to a paid plan.

entry.title: StatusCake.com
entry.description: StatusCake provides website uptime and performance monitoring with free and paid plans.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free plan includes basic uptime monitoring for up to 10 websites with 5-minute check intervals.
caveats: No SMS or phone alerts on free tier
Limited to basic monitoring features

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free StatusCake account.
Log in and navigate to the dashboard.
Click 'Add New Uptime Test' and enter your website URL.
Configure alert settings and save the monitor.
Check the dashboard for live status and alerts.
entry.whenToUse: Use StatusCake when you need simple, reliable uptime monitoring for a small number of websites or projects.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require advanced integrations, SMS/phone alerts, or need to monitor more than 10 sites.
entry.body: StatusCake offers a straightforward free tier for basic website uptime monitoring, suitable for individuals and small teams who need essential alerting without advanced features.

entry.title: StatusGator.com
entry.description: Aggregates and monitors status pages for cloud services, providing unified status dashboards and notifications.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier includes monitoring for up to 3 services with email notifications.
caveats: No SMS, Slack, or webhook notifications on free tier
Limited historical data access

useCases: Track status of critical SaaS providers
quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free StatusGator account.
Log in and access your dashboard.
Add up to 3 cloud services to monitor.
Configure email notification preferences.
View your unified status dashboard.
entry.whenToUse: Use StatusGator to monitor the status of multiple cloud services from a single dashboard and receive outage notifications by email.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you need advanced integrations (Slack, SMS, webhooks) or to monitor more than 3 services without upgrading.
entry.body: StatusGator.com provides a unified dashboard and email notifications for monitoring the status of up to 3 cloud services on its free tier.

entry.title: StatusPile
entry.description: StatusPile aggregates and monitors the status of popular cloud and SaaS services in a single dashboard.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free plan includes monitoring for up to 10 services with basic dashboard features.
caveats: Advanced integrations and custom notifications require paid plans

useCases: Track the status of multiple cloud providers
Centralize status updates for your team
quickstartSteps: Visit https://www.statuspile.com/ and sign up for a free account.
Log in and access your dashboard.
Add up to 10 services you wish to monitor from the available list.
Configure basic notification preferences if desired.
Bookmark your dashboard for quick access.
entry.whenToUse: Use StatusPile to monitor the status of multiple cloud or SaaS services from a single dashboard without custom integrations.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you need custom service monitoring, advanced integrations, or real-time alerting beyond basic notifications.
entry.body: StatusPile offers a free, easy-to-use dashboard to monitor the status of up to 10 popular cloud and SaaS services, ideal for individuals and small teams needing centralized status visibility without complex setup.

entry.title: UptimeObserver.com
entry.description: Website uptime monitoring service with free tier for basic checks and notifications.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier includes basic uptime checks and email alerts for a limited number of monitors.
caveats: No SMS or advanced integrations on free tier
Limited historical data retention

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free account at uptimeobserver.com.
Log in and add your website URL as a new monitor.
Configure check interval and alert email address.
Save the monitor and verify email notifications.
Review uptime reports in the dashboard.
entry.whenToUse: Use when you need simple, free uptime monitoring and email alerts for a few websites or projects.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require advanced integrations, SMS alerts, or monitoring for more than three sites.
entry.body: UptimeObserver.com offers basic website uptime monitoring with a free tier suitable for individuals and small teams needing simple alerting and reporting.

entry.title: Uptimetoolbox.com
entry.description: Uptimetoolbox.com provides free uptime monitoring for websites and APIs with instant alerts and simple dashboards.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier includes basic uptime monitoring and instant alerts for a limited number of monitors.
caveats: No SMS or advanced integrations in free tier
Limited historical data retention

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free Uptimetoolbox.com account.
Log in and click 'Add Monitor'.
Enter your website or API URL and configure check interval.
Set up your email for alert notifications.
Save and start monitoring your site.
entry.whenToUse: Use Uptimetoolbox.com to monitor the uptime of a few websites or APIs and receive instant email alerts for downtime.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you need advanced integrations, SMS alerts, or monitoring for more than five sites.
entry.body: Uptimetoolbox.com offers a simple, always-free solution for basic website and API uptime monitoring with instant email alerts and a user-friendly dashboard.

entry.title: WebScraping.AI
entry.description: WebScraping.AI provides an API for extracting structured data from web pages with built-in anti-bot protection.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier includes 1000 API requests per month.
caveats: Overages are billed automatically
Some advanced features require paid plan
billingRiskNotes: Overages only if you upgrade to paid plan

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free account at webscraping.ai.
Obtain your API key from the dashboard.
Read the API documentation for request format and parameters.
Send a test request to the API endpoint using your API key.
Parse the JSON response to extract the desired data.
entry.whenToUse: Use when you need to automate web data extraction without managing proxies or browser automation.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require scraping at very high volume, need custom browser logic, or must comply with strict site-specific terms.
entry.body: WebScraping.AI offers a simple API for extracting structured data from web pages, handling anti-bot measures and browser emulation automatically.

entry.title: Zenscrape
entry.description: Zenscrape provides a web scraping API with rotating proxies and browser emulation for extracting data from websites at scale.

freeTierDetails.summary: 1,000 API requests per month with full proxy and browser support.
caveats: No dedicated support on free tier
Rate limits apply

useCases: Extracting product data from e-commerce sites
quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free Zenscrape account.
Retrieve your API key from the dashboard.
Review API documentation for usage examples.
Send a test request to the API endpoint with your target URL.
Parse the returned HTML or JSON response.
entry.whenToUse: Use Zenscrape when you need reliable web scraping with proxy rotation and browser emulation for moderate monthly volumes.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require high-volume scraping, advanced anti-bot bypass, or need to scrape sites with strict legal restrictions.
entry.body: Zenscrape offers a simple API for web scraping with built-in proxy rotation and browser emulation, suitable for moderate data extraction needs.
